seo_title: Fansly Downloader - Browser Extension for Saving Fansly Media
seo_description: Download supported Fansly videos, images, GIFs, text posts, and creator-page media from content you can already access.
name: Fansly Downloader
tagline: Download Fansly videos, images, GIFs, text posts, and creator-page media for offline access
description: Fansly Downloader is a browser extension that helps users save supported videos, images, GIFs, text posts, and creator-page media from Fansly content they can already access.
troubleshooting_instructions: Refresh the Fansly page and let it load fully before scanning.
Play or reveal video posts briefly if media has not initialized yet.
Scroll creator pages to load more posts before using bulk collection.
installation_instructions:
1. Open the latest release: https://github.com/serpapps/fansly-downloader/releases/latest
2. Download the extension build for your browser
3. Install or load the extension
4. Open Fansly and sign in
5. Use the sidebar on supported creator pages or posts
usage_instructions: Open Fansly in the browser where the extension is installed
Sign in to the Fansly account with access to the content
Open a supported creator page or post
Select videos, images, text, or bulk tools
Start the download and wait for the browser download to complete
